facts.text: .intro { position: relative; padding-top: 10%; padding-bottom: 15%; padding-left: 10%; padding-right: 10%; } .intro > h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 60px; color: #333333; } .intro > h3 { font-family: Futura, "Trebuchet MS", Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: medium; font-size: 28px; padding-top: 10px; color: #333333; margin-bottom: 20px; } @media (max-width: 767px) { .intro { padding-bottom: 15%; } .intro > h1 { font-size: 3em; } } h1 { font-family: Futura,"Trebuchet MS",Arial,sans-serif; } ul, ol { font-size:18px; font-weight: 200; } .container { padding-bottom: 15px; } .content-section-left { background-color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 0; } /* Old CSS */ body, html { height: 100%; width: 100%; } .navbar-default { background-color: #F8F8F8; border-color: #524656; } .navbar-fixed-top { border-width: 0 0 0px; top: 0; } .navbar-default .navbar-brand { color: #333333; } .navbar-brand { float: left; font-size: 20px; height: 20px; line-height: 20px; padding: 15px; color: #555555; } h2 { color: #333333; } body { color: #666666; font-family: 'Oxygen', sans-serif; } h2, h3, h5, h6 { font-family: Futura, "Trebuchet MS", Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: medium; } h4 { font-family: 'Oswald', sans-serif; font-size: 36px; color: #333333; } h5 { font-size: 24px; color: #333333; } .lead { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 200; margin-bottom: 5px; margin-top: 5px; } .intro-header { padding-top: 50px; /* If you're making other pages, make sure there is 50px of padding to make sure the navbar doesn't overlap content!

*/ padding-bottom: 50px; color: #FFFFFF; background: url(../img/idno_landing_background2.jpg) no-repeat center center; background-size: cover; text-align: center; } .list-inline { padding-top: 30px; } .btn-primary { box-shadow: 0 3px #357EBD; background-color: #73b2e3; border-color: #73b2e3; color: #FFFFFF; margin-bottom: 10px; padding: 4px 46px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.33; } .btn-primary:hover, .btn-primary:focus, .btn-primary:active { box-shadow: 0 3px #357EBD; background-color: #4c93cb; border-color: #4c93cb; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 4px 46px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.33; } .btn-lg { padding: 10px 46px; } .btn-github { box-shadow: 0 3px #357EBD; background-color: #73b2e3; border-color: #73b2e3; color: #FFFFFF; margin-bottom: 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.33; } .btn-github:hover, .btn-github:focus, .btn-github:active { box-shadow: 0 3px #357EBD; background-color: #4c93cb; border-color: #4c93cb; color: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.33; } .btn-success { box-shadow: 0 3px #607f6e; background-color: #99CCB0; border-color: #99CCB0; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 0px 46px; margin-top: 15px; } .btn-success:hover, .btn-success:focus, .btn-success:active { box-shadow: 0 3px #607f6e; background-color: #8fbfa5; border-color: #8fbfa5; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 0px 46px; } .content-section-right { padding: 50px 0; } .content-section-bottom { padding: 50px 0; border-top: 10px solid #524656; border-bottom: 10px solid #524656; background-color: #F8F8F8; } .section-heading { margin-bottom: 30px; } .section-heading-spacer { border-top: 3px solid #8f3d4d; width: 200px; float: left; } .intro-github-buttons { text-align: center; } .email { padding: 100px 0; color: #f8f8f8; background-size: cover; } .collage { padding: 100px 0; color: #f8f8f8; background: url(../img/collage.jpg) no-repeat center center; background-size: cover; height: 300px; } .email h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 30px; font-family: Futura,"Trebuchet MS",Arial,sans-serif; font-weight: medium; color: #333333; margin-bottom: 20px; } .email p { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 200; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #666666; font-family: 'Oxygen',sans-serif; } footer { background-color: #f8f8f8; padding: 50px 0; border-top: 10px solid #524656; } p.copyright { margin: 15px 0 0; } .signup { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 20px; min-height: 20px; padding: 1px; box-shadow: none; } input.span4, textarea.span4, .uneditable-input.span4, { width: 50%; } input.span5, textarea.span5, .uneditable-input.span5, { width: 100%; } select { background-color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #CCCCCC; height: 30px; line-height: 30px; } select, textarea, input[type="text"], input[type="email"] { border-radius: 4px; color: #555555; display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; height: 40px; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; padding: 4px 6px; vertical-align: middle; width: 100%; margin: 0.5rem 0.5rem; } input[class*="span"], select[class*="span"] { float: none; margin-left: 0; } textarea, input[type="text"], input[type="email"] { background-color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #CCCCCC; box-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.075) inset; transition: border 0.2s linear 0s, box-shadow 0.2s linear 0s; } /*Begin Experiment*/ .landing { background: none repeat scroll 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); border-radius: 0.5rem; display: inline-block; margin: 0 auto; padding: 1.5rem 1.5rem; text-align: center; text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); width: auto; } .landing input[type="text"], .landing input[type="email"] { background-color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #CCCCCC; box-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.075) inset; transition: border 0.2s linear 0s, box-shadow 0.2s linear 0s; border-radius: 4px; height: 48px; padding: 0.75rem; vertical-align: bottom; width: 350px; margin: 1.5rem 1.0rem; }
